name: Axis Bank Magnus Credit Card for Burgundy

specialSpendRules.notes: User-verified rule: rent earns rewards up to Rs 50,000

exclusions: transactions excluded under Axis Bank Magnus for Burgundy terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on spends of Rs 30 lakh in the preceding card anniversary year
Limited-period fee waivers may apply for eligible Burgundy customers as per Axis Bank offer terms
additionalBenefits: New Magnus for Burgundy customers can choose a welcome voucher worth Rs 5,000 from eligible options such as Luxe, The Postcard Hotels or Yatra
60 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200 spent on Travel EDGE portal up to cumulative transactions of Rs 2 lakh per month
35 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200 on eligible incremental monthly spends above Rs 1.5 lakh, subject to product terms
5 EDGE REWARD Points convert to 4 partner miles across eligible travel partners
Unlimited domestic and international lounge access, subject to applicable programme terms
4 airport meet and assist services per calendar year for Burgundy variant as per current Axis terms
Enhanced Burgundy travel and transfer privileges via Axis eDGE Rewards

salaried: Requires eligible Axis Burgundy relationship and Axis Bank approval
selfEmployed: Requires eligible Axis Burgundy relationship and Axis Bank approval
